title: GoogleAdapter::convert_messages drops unknown content types as empty text
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
error-handling
## Location
src/providers/google.rs:32-51
## Violation
For MessageContent::Parts, when neither p.text nor p.image_url is set the closure falls through to json!({"text": ""}). This silently drops video content, file references, audio parts, or any unknown ContentPart variant. The user sends a multipart message expecting Gemini to handle, say, video, and gets an empty text part instead — no warning, no error. The Anthropic adapter has the same shape but at least keeps array Value::Array as-is via convert_messages_to_anthropic.
## Mandated refactor
Either (a) return an explicit Err with Unsupported when a ContentPart has none of the recognized fields, or (b) map ContentPart::content_type explicitly with a tracing::warn for unrecognized types and drop them by name (not silently as empty). Force callers to deal with the multimodal contract.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
